8834c44b45e5.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
8834c44b45e5.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
8834c44b45e5.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

475edb51efe5.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
475edb51efe5.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

6402fc9d9d30.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
6402fc9d9d30.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
6402fc9d9d30.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

0540886b40d8.title: Strong rating masks weak competitive position
0540886b40d8.description: Your 4.8/5 Google rating feels dominant but you sit below the local median (P33.3). Peer venues achieve similar or better ratings — in this market, 4.5 is table stakes, not a differentiator. Don't mistake the number for an advantage.
0540886b40d8.management_implication: The rating looks good in isolation but not in context.

fee1f56f5a24.title: Ranked #5 of 7 locally — peers are ahead
fee1f56f5a24.description: At percentile 33.3, customers in this area have higher-rated alternatives. This isn't a crisis but it means you're competing on convenience rather than reputation.

bcaf8322c4c6.title: Harder to book/find than competitors — friction losing customers
bcaf8322c4c6.description: You trail peers by 1.7 points on conversion. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.

985887aeb827.title: Protect the 4.8/5 rating — it took years to build
985887aeb827.description: With 763 reviews at 4.8/5, your discovery advantage is substantial. Protect it by responding to every review within 48 hours and prompting satisfied tables for feedback.
